description: Style NoteThis funky T-shirt from mr. men is a perfect choice for the young at heart. Pair this with form fitting denims and bright sneakers.Product DetailsGrey round neck t-shirt, has short sleeves with brand tag on the left sleeve, graphic and flock  print on the frontMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
